title: CatalogItem
description: A bibliographic record (book, ebook, film, etc.) in the NYPL Research Catalog / circulating catalog — the Bib object behind NYPL's discovery-api (the primary API supporting the Research Catalog) and the Sierra ILS. Reconciles a bib and its availability into one resource so an agent can search the catalog and check what's holdable. Keyed on the NYPL bib id.

bibId.description: NYPL bib identifier (Sierra bib number / discovery id) — primary key.

materialType.description: Format (e.g. Book, E-book, DVD, Audiobook, Microform).

collection.description: Whether the item circulates (holdable/borrowable) or is research/on-site only — this drives whether a Hold can be placed.

status.description: Availability status (e.g. Available, Checked out, On order).

holdable.description: Whether a hold can be placed on this copy.

catalogLink.description: Public Research Catalog page for the bib.
